description: Rolling cache hit rate aggregate across features. Added in v6.0. PARTIAL (audit FW-005): schema is correct but values populate only as features complete and the framework writes here from PM workflow phase transitions. Empty/zero values are expected initial state, not a bug — the measurement protocol exists but requires runs to populate. See framework-bugs-from-stress-test.md for the broader instrumentation gap.

hadf_affinity.note: Populated by HADF Layer 4. Updated on feature completion alongside cache metrics.

initial_state_note: All-zero values reflect that no PM workflow has yet written measurement data here. This is documentation, not code that needs fixing.
